policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-ai-04 - Allow supported kinds (Deny Foundry)'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+AI+services#IncidentremediationAIservices#drcp-ai-04 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AI services Deny Foundry
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents using unapproved AI services. Foundry is specifically denied as Cognitive Services account kind until MVP-phase.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
